widecast.notes: OutreachCRM uses WideCast ONLY as the operator-notification provider (Telegram via sendTelegramMessage with email fallback, plus optional uploadAsset for the report link). It is NOT used for production/video/publishing. Use https://widecast.ai/app/dashboard as the server; do not call https://api.widecast.ai unless a future release enables it. Copy this file to outreach-pipeline/provider_defaults.json during setup. Do not put API keys here. Notification is optional: with no provider configured, the daily run surfaces report links in chat and logs the blocker.
